Edwin Groothuis wrote:
> Maintainer of net/phpldapadmin,
> 
> Please note that PR ports/114131 has just been submitted.
> 
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
> 
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>     http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/114131
> 

I believe from other follow-ups on ports@... that this report was
due to a mistake by the submitter and the PR can be closed.

	Cheers,

	Matthew
